message:
feat(ops,tui): refine ops dashboard screens, overlay rendering, input handling, and theme consistency

- crates/frankensearch-ops/src/app.rs: App-level orchestration refinements
- crates/frankensearch-ops/src/overlays.rs: Overlay rendering improvements
- crates/frankensearch-ops/src/screens/alerts_slo.rs: Alerts/SLO screen updates
- crates/frankensearch-ops/src/screens/fleet.rs: Fleet management screen refinements
- crates/frankensearch-ops/src/screens/historical_analytics.rs: Historical analytics display enhancements
- crates/frankensearch-ops/src/screens/index_resources.rs: Index resources screen updates
- crates/frankensearch-ops/src/screens/live_stream.rs: Live stream screen improvements
- crates/frankensearch-ops/src/screens/project_detail.rs: Project detail view refinements
- crates/frankensearch-ops/src/screens/timeline.rs: Timeline screen updates
- crates/frankensearch-tui/src/input.rs: Input handling improvements
- crates/frankensearch-tui/src/shell.rs: Shell integration refinements
- crates/frankensearch-tui/src/theme.rs: Theme consistency updates
